title: Real-world safety and effectiveness of enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab in locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma: A multicenter Japanese cohort study.
abstract: Enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab (EVP) has emerged as a standard first-line treatment for locally advanced or metastatic urothelial carcinoma (la/mUC). However, large-scale real-world data in Japanese patients remain limited.
trial_name: Phase 3 randomized controlled trial of pembrolizumab plus chemotherapy versus chemotherapy
